data.body: Pre-beta deprecation sweep (maintainer-requested) added 3 children: registry-completeness+signalling (ordinary-cloth-chipmunk), remove uncatalogued user-facing deprecations (unclear-verymad-sablefish), internal shim cleanup (audacious-bairnish-ugandakob). KEEP boundary: the ~25-site event-schema/on-disk-store back-compat category is old-DATA replay compat, NOT dead code — do not remove (would corrupt replay of existing stores). See .joe-janitor/report-2026-07-07.md.
